id: test_flat
title: Test Flats
description: Simple flat proving ground for the custom map pipeline.
notes: dev-only test map (M44). Flat hp-3 ground, indestructible floor, small M cluster.
width: 120
height: 100
spawn_zones: [[2, 20, 50, 70]]
enemy_zones: [[70, 20, 116, 70]]
data:
